root_cause: A global helper requested ads with embedded categories/cities relationships on every page. Supabase returned HTTP 404 when those relationships were unavailable.
The ads query selected every column, including large image/custom data, making the homepage and category pages slow.
Ad pages ran a DOM polling interval every 200ms for 15 seconds.
fixes: Ad detail routes no longer download the complete ads table.
Removed embedded relationship joins from public ad queries.
Public list queries now select only needed columns and are limited to 120 rows.
Added a 6.5 second request timeout and safe fallback.
Replaced the 15-second 200ms polling loop with three lightweight passes.
